name: The Home Depot® Consumer Credit Card
network: PROPRIETARY (Home Depot / Citi Retail Services, closed-loop, not Visa or Mastercard)
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but purely a store-financing tool with no rewards and no use outside Home Depot

verdict.text: A project-financing card, not rewards: only for a 0% Home Depot purchase

earn_note: This card has no cash-back or points program of any kind. Its entire value proposition is deferred-interest financing ("no interest if paid in full within the promotional period") on Home Depot purchases, plus a modest new-account discount and an extended return window. If you want rewards for home-improvement spend, a general-purpose card with a home-improvement or everyday-purchases category will out-earn this every time.

points.note: No points or cash back exist on this card. Its value is entirely about financing terms: promotional 0%-interest windows (commonly 6 months on purchases of $299+, with longer up-to-24-month windows during special promotions) that revert to a high standard variable APR (published around 29.99% as of Citi's 2025/2026 disclosures) if not paid in full by the deadline, including retroactive interest back to the purchase date under deferred-interest terms, which is a real risk if you carry a balance past the promo window.

transfer_partners.highlight: No rewards currency exists on this card, so there is nothing to transfer.

protection_note: None of the usual card protections apply: this is a closed-loop retail financing account, not a Visa/Mastercard, so there's no purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance of any kind. $0 liability on unauthorized charges is the only fraud-related benefit found.
rental_note: No rental car coverage; this card can't be used for rentals or anywhere outside Home Depot and homedepot.com.

services.name: Deferred-interest project financing
services.detail: 6 months no-interest financing on purchases of $299+ if paid in full within the promo window; special promotions extend this up to 24 months at times. Missing the deadline triggers retroactive interest back to the purchase date.

services.name: New-account discount
services.detail: Save up to $100 on qualifying purchases when opening a new account; exact terms/tiers vary by promotion.

services.name: Extended return window
services.detail: Cardholders get 1 year to make returns instead of Home Depot's standard 90-day window, subject to Home Depot's Returns Policy exclusions.

services.name: Flexible due date
services.detail: Choose a payment due date at the beginning, middle, or end of the month.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users
additional_cards.note: No distinct authorized-user program or benefit was found for this card; it's a single-purpose store-financing account.

timeline.text: Structurally similar to other big-box store financing cards (e.g. Chase Slate Edge for credit-building): no rewards program, value comes entirely from 0%-interest promotional financing windows on qualifying purchases, not from earning anything back.
